result.markdown:
--- title: "Psykologisk trygghet" title-block-banner: "#009ca6" title-block-banner-color: "#FFFFFF" format: html execute: echo: true warning: false message: false cache: true editor_options: chunk_output_type: console --- ::: {.cell hash='09_psyktry_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-1_7637ffecb434a1023f883c44c57b21cd'} ```{.r .cell-code} library(foreign) library(readxl) library(RISEkbmRasch) # devtools::install_github("pgmj/RISEkbmRasch") library(grateful) library(ggrepel) library(car) library(kableExtra) library(readxl) library(tidyverse) library(eRm) library(mirt) library(psych) library(ggplot2) library(psychotree) library(matrixStats) library(reshape) library(knitr) library(cowplot) library(formattable) library(glue) library(hexbin) library(skimr) ### some commands exist in multiple packages, here we define preferred ones that are frequently used select <- dplyr::select count <- dplyr::count recode <- car::recode rename <- dplyr::rename # file paths will need to have "../" added at the beginning to be able to render document # get itemlabels itemlabels <- read_excel("../data/Itemlabels.xlsx") %>% filter(str_detect(itemnr, pattern = "pt")) %>% select(!Dimension) spssDatafil <- "../data/2023-04-26 Prevent OSA-enkat.sav" # read SurveyMonkey data df <- read.spss(spssDatafil, to.data.frame = TRUE) %>% select(starts_with("q0013"),q0001,q0002,q0003,q0004) %>% rename(Kön = q0002, Ålder = q0001, Bransch = q0003, Hemarbete = q0004) # SPSS format provides itemlabels too, we can save them in a dataframe spssLabels <- df %>% attr('variable.labels') %>% as.data.frame() dif.kön <- df$Kön dif.ålder <- df$Ålder dif.bransch <- df$Bransch dif.hemarbete <- df$Hemarbete df <- df %>% select(starts_with("q0013")) names(df) <- itemlabels$itemnr ``` ::: ## Items ::: {.cell hash='09_psyktry_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-2_4669bb00b6f117cf17d35a5c2947831d'} ```{.r .cell-code} itemlabels %>% kbl_rise(width = 45) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
itemnr item
pt1 Jag har en positiv känsla när jag kommer till jobbet.
pt2 Jag känner mig delaktig i gemenskapen på min arbetsplats.
pt3 Jag kan begå misstag utan att det hålls emot mig.
pt4 Jag kan öppet diskutera olika typer av svårigheter.
pt5 Jag blir inkluderad även om jag tycker annorlunda.
pt6 Mina ansträngningar värdesätts.
pt7 Mina idéer ges tid och uppmärksamhet.
````` ::: ::: ## Bakgrundsdata ::: panel-tabset ### Kön ::: {.cell hash='09_psyktry_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-3_1023d8409359cbbac221384793bab9a5'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIdemographics(dif.kön,"Kön") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
Kön n Percent
Kvinna 402 69.7
Man 172 29.8
Annat 1 0.2
Vill ej uppge 2 0.3
````` ::: ::: ### Ålder ::: {.cell hash='09_psyktry_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-4_01afa36084567063fca875caa9e72552'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIdemographics(dif.ålder,"Ålder") # kanske även fixa en figur? ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
Ålder n Percent
18-29 22 3.8
30-39 103 17.8
40-49 175 30.2
50-59 215 37.1
60+ 64 11.1
````` ::: ::: ### Bransch ::: {.cell hash='09_psyktry_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-5_ed9d97bd41c614cb8f2c537f123c7549'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIdemographics(dif.bransch,"Bransch") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
Bransch n Percent
Kontorsarbete (oavsett bransch) 284 49.1
Industri 26 4.5
Hotell, restaurang, service 8 1.4
Handel 16 2.8
Skola, utbildning 67 11.6
Vård, omsorg 99 17.1
Byggverksamhet 7 1.2
Annat 71 12.3
````` ::: ::: ### Arbete hemifrån ::: {.cell hash='09_psyktry_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-6_fdc49c0c030cfb12d3383bd727148956'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIdemographics(dif.hemarbete,"Antal dagar med arbete hemifrån") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
Antal dagar med arbete hemifrån n Percent
En dag 136 23.5
Två dagar 105 18.1
Tre dagar 35 6.0
Fyra dagar 10 1.7
Fem dagar 2 0.3
Jag arbetar aldrig eller sällan hemifrån 291 50.3
````` ::: ::: ::: ### Svarsbortfall items Vi filtrerar bort respondenter som har färre än två svar på frågorna i delskalan. ::: {.cell hash='09_psyktry_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-7_3052942598ac550b41ab32cdb59d2649'} ```{.r .cell-code} # If you want to include participants with missing data, input the minimum number of items responses that a participant should have to be included in the analysis: min.responses <- 2 scale.items <- itemlabels$itemnr # Select the variables we will work with, and filter out respondents with a lot of missing data df.omit.na <- df %>% filter(length(scale.items)-rowSums(is.na(.[scale.items])) >= min.responses) RImissing(df.omit.na,"pt") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](09_psyktry_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-7-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: Vi har extremt få saknade svar, och tar därför bort respondenterna som inte har kompletta svar. ::: {.cell hash='09_psyktry_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-8_9e17e1c8b7f187bb93662cee7282a654'} ```{.r .cell-code} df <- read.spss(spssDatafil, to.data.frame = TRUE) %>% select(starts_with("q0013"),q0001,q0002,q0003,q0004) %>% rename(Kön = q0002, Ålder = q0001, Bransch = q0003, Hemarbete = q0004) %>% na.omit() dif.kön <- df$Kön dif.ålder <- df$Ålder dif.bransch <- df$Bransch dif.hemarbete <- df$Hemarbete df <- df %>% select(starts_with("q0013")) names(df) <- itemlabels$itemnr df.omit.na <- df ``` ::: ### Alla svar för alla frågor ::: {.cell hash='09_psyktry_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-9_a9d2e24a931d4b74fe6d8995bddb88b4'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIallresp(df.omit.na) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display}
Response category Number of responses Percent
Alltid 1088 33.1
Mycket ofta 1196 36.4
Ganska ofta 553 16.8
Ibland 294 9.0
Sällan 118 3.6
Aldrig 34 1.0
::: ::: ::: {.cell hash='09_psyktry_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-10_434bcf52e625f035f9de1655023dda54'} ```{.r .cell-code} # koda om svarskategorier till siffror df.omit.na <- df.omit.na %>% mutate(across(everything(), ~ car::recode(.x,"'Aldrig'=0; 'Sällan' =1; 'Ibland'=2; 'Ganska ofta'=3; 'Mycket ofta'=4; 'Alltid'=5", as.factor = FALSE))) ``` ::: ### Descriptives - all items ::: panel-tabset #### Tile plot ::: {.cell hash='09_psyktry_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-11_02a22052e9d98e9b32d5afb860ac1319'} ```{.r .cell-code} RItileplot(df.omit.na) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](09_psyktry_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-11-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: #### Stacked bars ::: {.cell hash='09_psyktry_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-12_a4514a3ff4d69c6c8f8166be69f407c7'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIbarstack(df.omit.na) + ylab("Item") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](09_psyktry_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-12-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: #### Barplots ::: {.cell layout-ncol="2" hash='09_psyktry_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-13_573f2fa3198aea3f8350ab8fa3e16a41'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIbarplot(df.omit.na) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](09_psyktry_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-13-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](09_psyktry_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-13-2.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](09_psyktry_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-13-3.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](09_psyktry_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-13-4.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](09_psyktry_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-13-5.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](09_psyktry_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-13-6.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](09_psyktry_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-13-7.png){width=672} ::: ::: #### Guttman heatmap ::: {.cell hash='09_psyktry_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-14_66e253f54f4eb4badc2360030469ba77'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIheatmap(df.omit.na) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](09_psyktry_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-14-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ::: #### Fördelning av summerade svar ::: {.cell hash='09_psyktry_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-15_346b08e25b25f559c2206c378d8a98c7'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIrawdist(df.omit.na) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](09_psyktry_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-15-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ## Rasch-analys 1 ::: {.cell .column-margin hash='09_psyktry_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-16_27d6e3d6d4bf5f26f396107b70bb7dc7'} ::: {.cell-output-display}
itemnr item
pt1 Jag har en positiv känsla när jag kommer till jobbet.

pt4 Jag kan öppet diskutera olika typer av svårigheter.
pt5 Jag blir inkluderad även om jag tycker annorlunda.
pt6 Mina ansträngningar värdesätts.
pt7 Mina idéer ges tid och uppmärksamhet.
::: ::: ::: panel-tabset ### Item fit ::: {.cell hash='09_psyktry_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-17_d883ccffe28d695ec07e30579bda2b42'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIitemfitPCM2(df.omit.na, samplesize = 250, nsamples = 32, cpu = 8) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
OutfitMSQ InfitMSQ OutfitZSTD InfitZSTD
pt1 1.192 1.117 1.606 1.165
pt2 0.866 0.872 -1.156 -1.372
pt3 1.013 1.027 0.248 0.268
pt4 0.847 0.809 -1.539 -1.966
pt5 0.63 0.614 -3.924 -4.388
pt6 0.862 0.864 -1.559 -1.415
pt7 0.811 0.799 -1.872 -2.066
````` ::: ::: ### PCA ::: {.cell tbl-cap='PCA of Rasch model residuals' hash='09_psyktry_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-18_5cf01935957d0a1649a3c20ee51124d6'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIpcmPCA(na.omit(df.omit.na)) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}

0.96
0.77
````` ::: ::: ### Residual correlations ::: {.cell hash='09_psyktry_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-19_a240b07202f13da12cc20b6ce9aeb75b'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIresidcorr(df.omit.na, cutoff = 0.2) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
pt1 pt2 pt3 pt4 pt5 pt6 pt7
pt1

Note:
Relative cut-off value (highlighted in red) is 0.045, which is 0.2 above the average correlation.
````` ::: ::: ### 1st contrast loadings ::: {.cell hash='09_psyktry_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-20_8c297f3a27951493670dbd8acf6cda6f'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIloadLoc(df.omit.na) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](09_psyktry_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-20-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ### Analysis of response categories ::: {.cell layout-ncol="2" hash='09_psyktry_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-21_ca7bda4d39963247e74e1e9e2b466f48'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIitemCats(df.omit.na, items = "all") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](09_psyktry_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-21-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](09_psyktry_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-21-2.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](09_psyktry_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-21-3.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](09_psyktry_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-21-4.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](09_psyktry_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-21-5.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](09_psyktry_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-21-6.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](09_psyktry_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-21-7.png){width=672} ::: ::: ### Targeting ::: {.cell hash='09_psyktry_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-22_744afc26ffb822f78401bcb25b857f46'} ```{.r .cell-code} # increase fig-height above as needed, if you have many items RItargeting(df.omit.na, xlim = c(-5,5)) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](09_psyktry_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-22-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ### Item hierarchy ::: {.cell hash='09_psyktry_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-23_3fcd07debf168a8c371fb071a1fbcf3a'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIitemHierarchy(df.omit.na) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](09_psyktry_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-23-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ::: Det finns några residualkorrelationer som avviker, och item 5 är något låg i item fit. Största residualkorrelationen (med stor marginal) är mellan items 6 och 7. Eftersom item 7 har lite problem med svarskategorierna tas den bort. ::: {.cell hash='09_psyktry_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-24_79a2e86d39001f0cb6261acaf719a441'} ```{.r .cell-code} # create vector with eliminated items removed_items <- c("pt7") # select all items except those removed df2 <- df.omit.na %>% select(!any_of(removed_items)) ``` ::: ## Rasch-analys 2 ::: {.cell .column-margin hash='09_psyktry_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-25_fcebfc788bee5fc165d48284cfbdf0a9'} ::: {.cell-output-display}

Därför har svarskategorier med färre än 50 svar antingen exkluderas eller slagits ihop med andra svarskategorier (se avsnittet om bakgrundsdata för exakt antal svar per ordinarie kategori). DIF-variablerna omkodades till att innehålla följande kategorier: - Kön: man, kvinna - Ålder: 30-39, 40-49, 50-59, 60+ - Bransch: kontorsarbete, ej kontorsarbete - Hemarbete: aldrig eller sällan, en dag, minst två dagar Koden nedan specificerar exakt hur omkodningen gick till. ::: {.cell hash='09_psyktry_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-41_2f72a46540dfe6ee5dd6eb77965eafcc'} ```{.r .cell-code} # Omkodning för kön dif.kön <- recode(dif.kön,"'Annat'=NA;'Vill ej uppge'=NA") # Omkodning för ålder dif.ålder <- recode(dif.ålder,"'18-29'=NA") # Omkodning för bransch dif.bransch <- recode(dif.bransch,"'Industri'='Ej kontorsarbete';'Hotell, restaurang, service'='Ej kontorsarbete';'Handel'='Ej kontorsarbete';'Skola, utbildning'='Ej kontorsarbete';'Vård, omsorg'='Ej kontorsarbete';'Byggverksamhet'='Ej kontorsarbete';'Annat'='Ej kontorsarbete'") #Omkodning för hemarbete dif.hemarbete <- recode(dif.hemarbete,"'Fem dagar'='Minst två dagar';'Fyra dagar'='Minst två dagar';'Tre dagar'='Minst två dagar';'Två dagar'='Minst två dagar'") ``` ::: ::: panel-tabset ### Gender ::: {.cell hash='09_psyktry_cache/html/unnamed-chunk-42_fafa827bc9b8c7c032d192790ee70b4a'} ```{.r .cell-code} RIdifTable(df2, dif.kön) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` [1] "No significant DIF found." ``` ::: ::: ### Age ::: {.cell itemnr item
pt1 Jag har en positiv känsla när jag kommer till jobbet.
